name: Broiled Swordfish Mirabeau
recipeInstructions:
1. Roll the steaks in olive oil and broil for seven minutes on each side.
2. Season with salt and freshly-ground pepper while the fish is cooking.
3. Mix butter and anchovy paste and spread on the hot steaks as they come from the broiler.
4. Serve with a slice of lemon which has an anchovy fillet and an olive toothpicked into.
Also suitable for any thick, firm-fleshed fish such as King, cobia, grouper. Suggestions: Substitute paste made from smoked mullet or smoked mackerel.
